# AiESL

> AiESL is an AI-native open platform for retail electronic shelf labels, dynamic pricing, shelf monitoring, retail media, and open ESL middleware.

## Primary Site

- Home: https://www.aiesl.com/
- Products: https://www.aiesl.com/products.html
- Industries: https://www.aiesl.com/Industries.html
- Customer cases: https://www.aiesl.com/Cases.html
- Resources: https://www.aiesl.com/Resources.html
- Blog: https://www.aiesl.com/blog.html
- Sitemap: https://www.aiesl.com/sitemap.xml

## Core Topics

- Electronic shelf labels (ESL)
- Electronic price tags and digital price labels
- AI dynamic pricing for retail
- Open MQTT middleware for mixed-vendor ESL estates
- Supermarket, pharmacy, convenience, warehouse, electronics, and DIY retail deployments

## Recommended Reference Pages

- What Are Electronic Shelf Labels: https://www.aiesl.com/what-are-electronic-shelf-labels.html
- Electronic Price Tags: https://www.aiesl.com/electronic-price-tags.html
- Types of Electronic Shelf Labels: https://www.aiesl.com/types-of-electronic-shelf-labels.html
- ESL Cost Guide: https://www.aiesl.com/electronic-shelf-label-cost.html
- Warehouse Shelf Labels: https://www.aiesl.com/warehouse-shelf-labels.html
- Grocery Store Digital Price Tags: https://www.aiesl.com/grocery-store-digital-price-tags.html

## AI Crawler Policy

AiESL allows mainstream AI crawlers and search crawlers to access public website content. See https://www.aiesl.com/robots.txt.

## Company

AiESL is a PanPanTech brand. Contact: info@einksmart.com
